title: Claude Code Session Sync
description: Automatically save Claude Code conversations to SiYuan notes

setting.parentPathDesc: Parent path for session documents (under your notebook root)
setting.headerTemplateDesc: Template for new document header. Variables: ${projectName}, ${date}, ${time}, ${sessionId}
setting.hookInstalled: ✅ Claude Code Stop hook is installed
setting.notebookDesc: Select the notebook to save session documents
setting.siyuanPortDesc: Port of the SiYuan instance to connect to (default: 6806)
setting.claudeConfigDirDesc: Claude Code config directory name under home (e.g. .claude or .claude-internal)
setting.testSuccess: ✅ Connection successful! SiYuan API is reachable.
setting.resetTemplatesDesc: Reset message and header templates to defaults
setting.hookInstalledMsg: Hook installed successfully! Restart Claude Code to activate.
setting.hookUninstalledMsg: Hook uninstalled. Restart Claude Code to take effect.
